title: client-research checklist envelope
description: Shared envelope fields every skill's checklist.json carries as top-level siblings alongside its own skill-specific payload (boards/items). Documentation-grade: not wired into CI, but intended to be the single source of truth every skill's checklist.template.json / checklist.example.json is generated from. See ../references/checklist-pattern.md for the full mechanism this schema formalizes.

schema_version.description: Bumped whenever the on-disk shape changes in a way a skill needs to detect. A checklist.json missing this field is a legacy (pre-schema_version) file and must be migrated in place before use.

source_type.description: Fixed taxonomy shared by all four skills. job-board is stack-research-only; the other four are the evidence categories vendor-research and competitor-research already used before this schema (site/prensa/LinkedIn/directorios), given consistent slugs here.

source.description: Replaces the old bare source_urls/posting_urls string entries. A migrated legacy entry gets access_date/publish_date/source_type set to null -- that metadata was never captured before and can't be reconstructed retroactively; only entries written going forward carry real values.

access_date.description: When the skill actually fetched this URL.

publish_date.description: When the source content itself was published, if that was discoverable. Often null -- not every page exposes one.
